column1: Maikel Garcia sits atop today’s Beat The Streak board, leading off at home for Kansas City with a steady bat and a prime platoon advantage against Kyle Freeland. Garcia’s top-of-the-order role and a strong 72.5% hit probability make him the definition of a reliable pick, especially in a favorable park. Right behind him, Bobby Witt Jr. brings nearly identical upside from the two-hole, also benefiting from the same juicy matchup and a knack for finding his way on base. For those looking to mix it up, Bo Bichette’s consistent profile and Chandler Simpson’s lefty edge at home both offer intriguing alternatives, but Garcia’s setup is as good as it gets for streak seekers tonight.
